title: Scorpio's F/A
description: A texture pack for the Fossils and archeology mod that changes a couple of the textures.
body:
This resource pack is made for fun and I may add to it when I get the chance.

Changes the following Mobs/Blocks:

- Ankylosaurus(texture fix for female)
- Ceratosaurus
- Dimorphodon
- Parasaurolophus
- Spinosaurus
- Tyrannosaurus
- Plesiosaurus
- Reinforced Glass
- Stegosaurus(texture fix)
- Triceratops
- Dilophosaurus
- Deinonychus
- Citipati
- Velociraptor
- Therizinosaurus
